title: Resume or End a Tipper Cycle After a Tipper Cycle Stopped Alarm
summary: Use the documented corrective action for the Left Tipper "Tipper Cycle Stopped" alarm to either resume the cycle with CYCLE START or end the cycle with RESET after confirming the alarm text and listed cause.
when_to_use: Use when the alarm text matches "Left Tipper: Tipper Cycle Stopped" and the operator is applying the corrective action documented in the alarm table.
not_for: Do not use for other alarm texts unless the source table gives the same corrective action.
Do not assume this procedure applies to the right tipper without source confirmation; the cited source excerpt explicitly names the Left Tipper entry.

responsibilities: Confirm the alarm text on the HMI or alarm list.
Verify the documented cause in the alarm table.
Press CYCLE START to resume the cycle or RESET to end the cycle.
Observe whether the cycle resumes or ends as expected.

safety_notes: Use only the documented controls and corrective action provided for the matching alarm entry.
Do not apply this procedure to a different alarm condition unless the source provides the same corrective action.
access_or_tools_needed: Access to the relevant operator station or documented control interface
Alarm text confirmation from the HMI or alarm list

access_required: Access to the relevant operator station or documented control interface
system_preconditions: The displayed alarm text matches "Left Tipper: Tipper Cycle Stopped" or the corresponding tipper cycle stopped entry.

visual_references.description: Operator Station HMI VISU_ALARM screen showing tipper alarms and timestamps for confirming the alarm text.
Operator Station control panel screen showing CYCLE START and alarm messaging relevant to applying the corrective action.
Hospital HMI alarms list with timestamps; included as a packet artifact for alarm review context.

steps.title: Confirm the tipper cycle stopped alarm text
steps.purpose: Ensure the corrective action is being applied to the correct alarm condition.
steps.instruction: Review the displayed alarm list and confirm the alarm text matches "Left Tipper: Tipper Cycle Stopped" or the corresponding tipper cycle stopped entry before taking action.
steps.expected_result: The operator confirms the alarm text matches the documented alarm entry.
steps.healthy_condition: The alarm list shows the matching tipper cycle stopped alarm entry.
steps.failure_condition: The displayed alarm text does not match the documented alarm entry or cannot be confirmed.

actions.label: Review alarm list
actions.exact_action: Confirm the displayed alarm text matches 'Left Tipper: Tipper Cycle Stopped' or the corresponding tipper cycle stopped entry.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: VISU_ALARM view showing the list of tipper alarms and their timestamps.
Alarm list with timestamps if alarm review is being performed from the hospital HMI context.

stop_or_escalate_if: The alarm text does not match the documented tipper cycle stopped entry.
The alarm cannot be confirmed from the available HMI or alarm list.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Left Tipper: Tipper Cycle Stopped — Cause: Op Station in Cycle Stopped state. Controller Response: Cycle stops. Corrective Action: Press CYCLE START to resume or RESET to end cycle.
The Visu_Alarm screen displays a list of all tipper alarms along with a timestamp.

steps.title: Verify the documented cause
steps.purpose: Confirm the alarm condition aligns with the cause listed in the source before using the corrective action.
steps.instruction: Verify from the alarm table that the cause for this alarm is that the operator station is in Cycle Stopped state.
steps.expected_result: The operator confirms the listed cause matches the current alarm entry.
steps.healthy_condition: The alarm table identifies the cause as "Op Station in Cycle Stopped state."
steps.failure_condition: The listed cause does not match or the operator cannot verify the cause from the source.

actions.label: Check alarm table cause
actions.exact_action: Verify from the table that the cause is the Op Station being in Cycle Stopped state.

stop_or_escalate_if: The source table cannot be consulted.
The listed cause does not match "Op Station in Cycle Stopped state."

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Left Tipper: Tipper Cycle Stopped — Cause: Op Station in Cycle Stopped state. Controller Response: Cycle stops. Corrective Action: Press CYCLE START to resume or RESET to end cycle.

steps.title: Resume or end the cycle using the documented control
steps.purpose: Apply the source-defined corrective action for the alarm.
steps.instruction: Press CYCLE START to resume the cycle, or press RESET to end the cycle, using the documented corrective action.
steps.expected_result: The selected control is accepted and the system attempts to resume or end the cycle accordingly.
steps.healthy_condition: CYCLE START resumes the cycle, or RESET ends the cycle, consistent with the alarm table.
steps.failure_condition: The selected control does not clear the stopped condition or the alarm remains active.

actions.label: Press CYCLE START
actions.exact_action: Press CYCLE START to resume the cycle.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Operator Station control panel showing the CYCLE START control and alarm messaging area.

stop_or_escalate_if: The alarm remains active after using the documented control.
The control needed to perform the documented action is not available on the interface.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Corrective Action: Press CYCLE START to resume or RESET to end cycle.
The Operator Station Control Panel includes CYCLE START and alarm messaging; green bars above buttons indicate which controls are active.

steps.title: Observe the resulting cycle state
steps.purpose: Verify that the corrective action produced the expected outcome.
steps.instruction: Observe whether the cycle resumes or ends as expected after the selected control is used.
steps.expected_result: The tipper either resumes operation after CYCLE START or the cycle ends after RESET.
steps.healthy_condition: System behavior matches the documented corrective action outcome.
steps.failure_condition: The cycle does not resume or end as expected, or the alarm remains active.

actions.label: Observe cycle response
actions.exact_action: Observe whether the cycle resumes or ends as expected after the selected control is used.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Control panel status and alarm messaging after pressing CYCLE START or RESET.
Alarm list to verify whether the tipper cycle stopped alarm remains active.

stop_or_escalate_if: The alarm remains active after using the documented control.
The cycle does not resume after CYCLE START.
The cycle does not end after RESET.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Controller Response: Cycle stops. Corrective Action: Press CYCLE START to resume or RESET to end cycle.

success_criteria: The alarm text was confirmed as the documented tipper cycle stopped entry.
The operator used the documented corrective action from the source.
The tipper resumed after CYCLE START or the cycle ended after RESET, consistent with the source.
healthy_conditions: The alarm entry matches "Left Tipper: Tipper Cycle Stopped."
The listed cause is "Op Station in Cycle Stopped state."
After operator action, the cycle resumes or ends as expected.
failure_conditions: The displayed alarm text does not match the documented alarm entry.
The cause cannot be verified from the source table.
The alarm remains active after pressing CYCLE START or RESET.
The cycle does not resume or end as expected after the selected control is used.
escalation_guidance: Escalate if the alarm remains active after using the documented control.
Escalate if the displayed alarm text does not match the documented entry and no matching source-supported corrective action is available.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Alarm list and timestamps for confirming the active tipper alarm.
CYCLE START control and alarm messaging on the operator station control panel.

source_refs.quote_or_summary: Left Tipper: Tipper Cycle Stopped — Cause: Op Station in Cycle Stopped state. Controller Response: Cycle stops. Corrective Action: Press CYCLE START to resume or RESET to end cycle.

missing_details: The packet does not provide a source-supported estimated completion time.
The packet does not provide source-supported production stop or LOTO requirements for this procedure.
The packet does not provide a source-supported RESET control image artifact explicitly tied to this alarm action.
The candidate notes that right-side applicability should be confirmed during review because the cited source excerpt explicitly names the Left Tipper entry.
